title: eritrichium obovatum
intro: Eritrichium obovatum, also known as the narrow-leaved or oval-leaved eritrichium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and promoting wound healing, among others. Eritrichium obovatum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in folk medicine for centuries, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
